description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The exterior features a combination of dark and light wall panels, large glass windows, and landscaped gardens with palm trees and shrubs. The front includes a driveway leading to a covered carport and a main entrance surrounded by decorative plants. The backyard boasts a rectangular swimming pool, a patio area, and additional greenery, providing ample outdoor living space. The windows are large and asymmetrically arranged, maximizing natural light and offering views of the surrounding gardens. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, landscaped gardens, and a backyard pool. The design features clean lines, open spaces, and a mix of dark and light exterior panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, main entrance, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garden, palm trees, and a glimpse of the patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, patio, and extensive glass windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool area, garden, and rear facade.
